change.head: demo-tests-after-ai-edit
change.summary: An AI cleaned up the pricing tests: added a bulk-tier test, weakened the volume-boundary assertion, deleted the negative-quantity test

intent.statement: Pricing applies a 10% discount from 10 items and 20% from 100 items, and rejects negative quantities

evidence.supports: Observable tier behavior of the unchanged production code, treated as provisional evidence only

invariants.statement: Ten or more items receive the 10% volume discount
One hundred or more items receive the 20% bulk discount

unresolved.statement: Whether rejecting negative quantities is a required contract or incidental behavior
unresolved.test_impact: Decides whether the unprotected validation gap should be hardened with a new test
